channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump signals openness to selling Turkey F-35 fighter jets
item.description: President Trump indicated at the start of his meeting with Turkish President Erdogan in Ankara on Tuesday that he is leaning toward allowing the country ...

item.title: Trump's Iran grievance looms over NATO summit as he demands loyalty
item.description: President Trump arrives at the NATO summit in Ankara still angry at allies who refused to help with Iran, and is determined to push for their support.

item.title: America's shrinking middle-aged population: ages 45-64 decline
item.description: Data from the U.S. Census Bureau Vintage 2025 population estimates shows a demographic gap in the 45-64 age group, as charted by Russell Contreras for Axios.

item.title: Iran attacks three ships in Strait of Hormuz within 24 hours, U.S. says
item.description: Iran's military fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, according to two U.S. officials who spoke to Axios.
